chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 88 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge(s) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Irfan Aziz, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General. Mr. Sandeep Malani, Assistant Advocate General Sindh. The prayer clause reads as follows: “I) Direct the Respondents No. 02 to clear and issue No Objection Certificate in favour of Petitioner in respect of Property i.e Bungalow No. C-95, Block-8, Gulshan-e-Iqbal, Karachi. II) Direct the Respondents No.03 to process the transaction of Petitioner’s Property without any hindrance of Respondent No. 02 and other Officials. III) Restrain the Respondents from taking any action against the Petitioner and her property. IV) Cost of the Petition and / or any other relief which this Hon’ble Court may deem fit and proper under the circumstances of the Case.” Prima facie, the petitioner is seeking to assail rights in respect of immovable property and the same is not amenable in writ jurisdiction. The dispute requires inquiry, investigation and evidence etc and writ jurisdiction is not appropriate forum in such regard. In view hereof, petition is found to be misconceived, hence dismissed. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
